# Select

A dropdown select component built on Ark UI via Chakra UI. Provides a trigger, positioner, and content dropdown with optional Field wrapper for labels and validation.

## Import

```jsx
import { Select, SelectItem, SelectItemGroup } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `collection` | `ListCollection` | - | The collection of items for the select (from Chakra `createListCollection`) |
| `options` | `Array<{ label: string, value: string }>` | `[]` | Simple options array (alternative to `collection`) |
| `onValueChange` | `(details: { value: string[] }) => void` | - | Callback fired when the selected value changes |
| `value` | `string[]` | - | Controlled selected value(s) |
| `defaultValue` | `string[]` | - | Initial selected value(s) for uncontrolled usage |
| `variant` | `"outline" \| "subtle" \| "flushed"` | `"outline"` | The visual variant of the select trigger |
| `size` | `"xs" \| "sm" \| "md" \| "lg"` | `"md"` | The size of the select |
| `placeholder` | `string` | `"Select option"` | Placeholder text displayed when no value is selected |
| `label` | `string` | - | Label text displayed above the select |
| `helperText` | `string` | - | Helper text displayed below the select (hidden when invalid) |
| `errorText` | `string` | - | Error text displayed below the select (shown when invalid) |
| `invalid` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the select is in an invalid state |
| `required` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the select is required |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the select is disabled |
| `colorPalette` | `string` | `"primary"` | The color palette for the select |
| `children` | `ReactNode` | - | Custom content for the dropdown (overrides `options`) |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the root element |

## Sub-components

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `SelectItem` | An individual item in the select dropdown |
| `SelectItemGroup` | A group of items with an optional label |

## Usage

### Basic with options array

```jsx
<Select
  options={[
    { label: "React", value: "react" },
    { label: "Vue", value: "vue" },
    { label: "Angular", value: "angular" },
  ]}
  placeholder="Select a framework"
/>
```

### With collection

```jsx
import { createListCollection } from "@chakra-ui/react";

const frameworks = createListCollection({
  items: [
    { label: "React", value: "react" },
    { label: "Vue", value: "vue" },
    { label: "Angular", value: "angular" },
  ],
});

<Select collection={frameworks} placeholder="Select a framework" />
```

### With label and validation

```jsx
<Select
  label="Country"
  helperText="Select your country of residence"
  options={countries}
  required
/>

<Select
  label="Country"
  invalid={true}
  errorText="Country is required"
  options={countries}
/>
```

### With custom children

```jsx
<Select collection={frameworks}>
  <SelectItem item={{ label: "React", value: "react" }}>
    React - A JavaScript library
  </SelectItem>
  <SelectItem item={{ label: "Vue", value: "vue" }}>
    Vue - The Progressive Framework
  </SelectItem>
</Select>
```

## Features

- Renders a full select dropdown with trigger, positioner, and content via Portal
- Automatically wraps in a Field when `label`, `helperText`, or `errorText` is provided
- Supports both simple `options` array and Chakra `collection` API
- Exposes `SelectItem` and `SelectItemGroup` for advanced custom layouts
- Forwards refs to the root element
